short: A 6% monthly churn on a $13,780 B2C SaaS wipes out $800‑plus of MRR each month – that’s half your runway in a year. Benchmark by segment, not a generic “5% is fine”. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/typical-saas-churn-rate
title: Typical SaaS Churn Rate: How Bootstrapped Founders Can Benchmark and Protect Their Runway
